name: Alkuri Global Acquisition Corp.
summary: Alkuri Global Acquisition Corp. does not have significant operations. It intends to effect a merger, capital stock exchange, asset acquisition, stock purchase, reorganization, or related business combination with one or more businesses. The company was formerly known as Ark Global Acquisition Corp. and changed its name to Alkuri Global Acquisition Corp. in March 2020. Alkuri Global Acquisition Corp. was incorporated in 2020 and is based in Nashville, Tennessee.
